title: UI refiner: build-oriented ui_spec for four App Router routes
description: ui-refiner-agent merges critique + design_system + Stitch section order into artifacts/ui_spec.json (build contract for frontend). Updates design_package.json references.ui_spec, documents route-to-screen mapping (four segments 1:1), activity feed data projection expectations for the fixture handler, and route-scoped dark theming notes for Task Creation (Dark). No Stitch regeneration.
acceptance: artifacts/ui_spec.json exists; design_package.json references.ui_spec is non-null with portable relative path.
ui_spec explicitly maps four App Router routes to the four stitch screens (paths named in spec; stable for EM/frontend handoff).
ui_spec defines activity feed list/empty states and JSON field expectations consumed by the feed Route Handler contract.
ui_spec states Task Creation (Dark) uses route-scoped dark theme only (no global dark requirement for other routes).
design_package.json blockers is accurate; status suitable for frontend handoff (e.g. refining or baseline_frozen per policy).
